scope: The three successful architectures on the frozen bounded IKD-W2 source class; cross-feature conjunctions and actual-process correspondence excluded.

tested_factor_candidates.reason: Graph incidence alone does not preserve reasoning-relevant commitments, admissibility, dependency, or revision.
Transitions alone do not recover grounds, semantic commitments, supersession, or historical dependency.
Provenance alone does not determine admissible evolution or operational consequences.
An unrestricted interpreter can reconstruct any source and therefore supplies no nontrivial constraint.

common_factor.name: recoverable constrained commitment dynamics
commitments: A distinguishable configuration carries recoverable commitment content.
Declared admissibility conditions constrain which evolutions are permitted.
Each accepted evolution preserves or explicitly revises dependency and ground information.
Supersession and revision preserve queryable historical identity rather than retroactively rewriting prior states.
A uniform bounded-query recovery interface exposes commitments, admissible evolution, dependencies, and history without source-specific or future-information oracles.
common_factor.reasoning_relevant_role: Separates a reasoning process from an arbitrary labeled transition structure by requiring recoverable commitments, constrained evolution, and dependency-preserving revision.

COALG-DYN-001: coalgebraic evolution map and behavioral constraints

common_factor.translation_rule: Realizations need not share labels or ontology; they must support the same registered recovery queries and preserve the same operational and historical distinctions.
common_factor.cost_rule: Adapters, observation maps, provenance projections, semantic interfaces, canonicalizers, and equivalent reintroductions are charged.

nonclaims: RCCD-001 is globally minimal or necessary
